stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The following two images show the buffet margins of the same aircraft. Aircraft A has a larger gap between the yellow bars than Aircraft B has. Considering Aircraft B with the smaller gap, what does this indicate about the aircraft’s buffet margin?

options.a: The aircraft is operating closer to its critical angle of attack
options.c: The aircraft has a higher safety margin
options.d: The aircraft is flying at a lower altitude
